Platform Products Solutions Why SYAG Pricing
Request a demo

One platform. Complete operational control.

SYAG replaces your scattered tools with six integrated product categories — guard management, incident response, visitor control, smart monitoring, compliance reporting, and workflow automation. Every product works standalone. Every product works better together.

Request a demo →

Security Operations

Detect, respond, and resolve incidents from a single operational view.

Incident Management

From the first alert to final resolution, every incident is tracked, assigned, and closed — nothing falls through the cracks.

Learn more →

Smart Alerts

Automated notifications triggered by cameras, sensors, or overdue patrols. The right person is warned at the right time.

Learn more →

Operations Center

A live dashboard that shows everything happening across your facility right now — guards, incidents, visitors, and sensors.

Learn more →

Workforce & Patrols

Know where every guard is, verify they did their job, and manage shifts without spreadsheets.

Guard Management

Schedule shifts, track GPS locations, manage attendance, and oversee your entire security team from one screen.

Learn more →

Patrol & Checkpoints

Verify guard presence at every checkpoint with QR scans and proof of visit. No patrol goes unconfirmed.

Learn more →

Guard Register

A digital log of every guard action — clock-ins, patrol completions, incident responses — all timestamped and tamper-proof.

Learn more →

Visitor & Access Control

Know who is on your premises at all times — from arrival to departure.

Visitor Management

Issue QR passes, track check-ins and check-outs, flag overstays, and blacklist unwanted visitors — all automated.

Learn more →

Access Records

A complete history of who entered, when, and through which gate. Searchable and exportable for any audit.

Learn more →

Smart Monitoring

Connect your cameras and sensors to a security picture that acts — not just watches.

Camera & Video

Your cameras don't just record — they trigger alerts, create incidents, and feed your operations center in real time.

Learn more →

Smart Sensors

Panic buttons, motion detectors, UPS monitors, and environmental sensors — all connected to your incident pipeline.

Learn more →

Equipment & Assets

Track every piece of security equipment from purchase to retirement. Know what's working, what's due for maintenance, and what's missing.

Learn more →

Reports & Records

Prove what happened, when, and who responded. Every event is documented.

Audit & Compliance

Track every action across your system with a secure, tamper-proof history. Built for the compliance standards MEA facilities require.

Learn more →

Operational Reports

Shift summaries, patrol completion rates, incident response times — generated automatically, ready when you need them.

Learn more →

Administration & Setup

Configure your facility, assign roles, and automate workflows without calling IT.

Flow Automation

Build your security logic visually — no developer required. When X happens, automatically do Y. Set it once, it runs forever.

Learn more →

Site Configuration

Define your sites, gates, checkpoints, and zones. Assign guards and supervisors. Set schedules and rules.

Learn more →

Roles & Permissions

Control who sees what — facility admins, supervisors, and guards each get their own view with the right level of access.

Learn more →

One platform. Full visibility. Faster response.

Every product in SYAG connects to the same operational picture. Incidents link to guards. Guards link to patrols. Visitors link to gates. Sensors link to alerts. You don't manage six tools — you manage one facility.
